accepted_fixes.summary: Prospective tree removes active terminal archives, mutable results and direct DuckDB writers; whole-tree boundary tests were added.
Generic and transport capture paths cannot mint provider-qualified capability; authoritative provider path remains blocked.
Experimental and controlled result classes are separated and portfolio transition hashes are present, but controlled results remain manually forgeable.
Bundle v3 replays base/adverse execution and NAV, but does not replay research provenance or qualification.

findings.title: Real controlled runner results cannot enter ReturnArtifact because stage_session is the signal date while ReturnArtifact requires the execution date.
findings.minimum_fix: Bind signal_session and execution_session explicitly and prove execution is the next accepted session; replace synthetic positive-path fixtures with real runner chains.

findings.title: ControlledStageResult and FinalRunReceipt can be forged with object.__new__ and module-private tokens.
findings.minimum_fix: Create canonical persisted stage receipts and recompute input identity, execution receipt chain, stage hash, portfolio continuity and NAV during verification.

findings.title: FinalRun and Return evidence are not bound to the preregistered strategy, dataset, universe and costs.
findings.minimum_fix: Add ordered per-stage TrialRunReceipts binding trial, decision artifact, dataset, universe, costs, run config and engine artifact.

findings.title: Historical qualification StagePlan can differ from the StageContext used by run_candidate_rebalance.
findings.minimum_fix: Separate frozen historical evaluation from prospective qualified-stage execution and make each API bind its own explicit plan.

findings.title: A real multi-trial multiplicity family cannot be represented because all trials are required to share one CandidateRunConfig SHA.
findings.minimum_fix: Separate FamilyContract from TrialConfig and anchor the ordered set of real trial configuration hashes.

findings.title: Evaluated returns are matched only by observed date and are not bound to label_end_at horizon or selected contributor set.
findings.minimum_fix: Bind start/end sessions, compounded net NAV return, contributor set and weights or aggregate receipt to each evaluated sample/horizon.

findings.title: Experiment history can restart under another QUANT_DATA_ROOT and the ledger cannot reconstruct full events.
findings.minimum_fix: Bind an immutable project/data-owner identity, persist full canonical event payloads, and provide a verified loader with globally stable holdout keys.

findings.title: The Python audit-hook transformation runner is bypassable through ctypes/native system calls and is not hermetic.
findings.minimum_fix: Use a controlled pure transform or OS-level isolation; do not extend the audit-hook as if it were a security boundary.

findings.title: Candidate bundle v3 replays execution but not strategy, dataset, historical return, statistics or experiment qualification.
findings.minimum_fix: Use a role-indexed artifact manifest and rebuild the complete research qualification chain before replaying execution.

findings.title: Experiment ledger and lock lack O_NOFOLLOW, single-link and inode/path identity protection.
findings.minimum_fix: Reuse the canonical writer pinned-file helper and post-commit ambiguity handling.

findings.title: TerminalAction payment-date checks mix UTC dates with exchange-local session dates.
findings.minimum_fix: Validate payment chronology only in the exchange/session-aware path using the local session date.

findings.title: Final receipts and bundles do not bind the exact core-engine/package/runtime artifact.
findings.minimum_fix: Bind an exact source/package/runtime manifest and publish downloadable CI artifacts and hashes.

findings.title: A-share evidence-room Release still lacks an independent external reviewer receipt.
findings.minimum_fix: Independent read-only download, manifest verification, validation-command execution, reviewer identity and zero-write receipt.

codex_constraints: Do not add managers, dispatchers, registries, ticket systems, proxy layers or a second writer.
Prioritize a real positive event-loop chain over more generic receipt abstractions.
Do not use tests/controlled_result_fixtures.py as evidence for the controlled candidate happy path.
Separate historical qualification from prospective execution.
Keep all authorization fields false until a later external audit.
Do not close real-data, authoritative-provider or EA-001 items with fixtures.
recommended_commit_order: stage signal/execution semantics and real controlled chain
historical qualification versus prospective execution split
FamilyContract versus TrialConfig and full ledger payloads
ledger path identity, terminal local date and engine artifact binding
